ddls:
CREATE TABLE "points_of_interest" (
  "dataKey" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point of interest */,
  "pointX" REAL /* X-coordinate of the point of interest */,
  "pointY" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the point of interest */,
  "pointZ" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the point of interest */,
  "colorR" REAL /* Red color component for visualization */,
  "colorG" REAL /* Green color component for visualization */,
  "colorB" REAL /* Blue color component for visualization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the brain region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the point of interest */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the brain region */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the point of interest was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the point of interest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataKey")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated institution or department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, TXT) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dataset */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the dataset in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "dataKey" INTEGER /* ID of the point of interest accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataKey FOREIGN KEY ("dataKey") REFERENCES points_of_interest ("dataKey"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_codes" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color code */,
  "colorR" REAL /* Red color component */,
  "colorG" REAL /* Green color component */,
  "colorB" REAL /* Blue color component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_mapping" (
  "dataKey" INTEGER /* ID of the point of interest */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated color code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataKey", "color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataKey" INTEGER /* ID of the point of interest */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataKey FOREIGN KEY ("dataKey") REFERENCES points_of_interest ("dataKey")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brain_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the brain region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brain region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_mapping" (
  "dataKey" INTEGER /* ID of the point of interest */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated brain region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataKey", "region_id")
)
